  "findings": [
    "Formwork has been fully erected and braced but has not been oiled or treated with a release agent prior to reinforcement placement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Apply an approved form-release agent to all concrete contact surfaces before reinforcing steel is placed and concrete is poured."
  ],
  "rationale": "According to ACI 347, formwork surfaces must be treated with a form-release agent before concrete placement to prevent adhesion, ensure clean stripping, and protect the concrete surface. Applying release agents after rebar is installed can contaminate the steel and compromise the concrete-to-steel bond.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347 Guide to Formwork for Concrete"
  ]
}
